violations.description: POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of frozen and then thawed to alow for consumtion was noted not being properly dated for disposition.

SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service items articles noted made of unapproved materials. Observed food items stored in a sheet pan in the prep top coolers covered with a kitchen drawstring garbage bag. Kitchen garbage bags are not appropriate as a food storage method.
